title: Customer Support Specialist
raw_jd: Provide front-line support for a B2B helpdesk product. Triage tickets, answer chat and email inquiries, document reproducible bugs, maintain accurate macros, and escalate complex technical issues with clear context. Success requires calm written communication, customer empathy, and reliable follow-through.
expected_nice_to_haves: Experience with Zendesk or similar tooling
expected_disqualifiers: No evidence of customer-facing support experience
scoring_notes: Strong candidates balance empathy with structured troubleshooting and know when to escalate.
